steps.title: Use the sign of the inputs
steps.content:
Since $a<0$, both $18a$ and $7a$ are negative. Their absolute values are their opposites.
$$
|18a|=-18a
$$
$$
|7a|=-7a
$$

steps.title: Multiply the values
steps.content: Find the requested product. $$ f(18a)f(7a)=(-33)(-22)=726 $$ The answer is 726.
